description:
GammaLauncher Setup

A standalone launcher for vvvv gamma
And yet another bugfix!
You might have noticed that recently, the launcher would not show preview releases. Well, this is now fixed. Culprit was a misused parameter in the query that returns builds from the build server. Thanks @berkut0 for the report!
You can download the release here, or wait for it to be validated on Chocolatey!
